assertions.description: scroll-target-group: auto parses and establishes a scroll marker group container.
scroll-target-group: none parses as the initial value that does not establish a scroll marker group container.
The property grammar is limited to none | auto, so the non-spec highlight keyword is rejected.
The initial computed value of scroll-target-group is none.
The computed value of scroll-target-group: auto is the specified keyword auto.
scroll-target-group is not inherited; a child of an auto container still computes to none unless specified.
:target-current parses as the pseudo-class used to style the active scroll marker.
Anchors in an auto scroll-target-group become scroll markers whose active target matches :target-current as the container scrolls.
assertions.test: (async()=>{if(!CSS.supports('scroll-target-group: auto')||!CSS.supports('selector(:target-current)'))return false;const uid='stg-'+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2);const ids=[uid+'-one',uid+'-two',uid+'-three'];const host=document.createElement('div');host.style.cssText='position:fixed;left:-10000px;top:0;width:260px;height:160px;overflow:auto;scroll-behavior:auto;';const nav=document.createElement('nav');nav.style.setProperty('scroll-target-group','auto');for(const [i,id] of ids.entries()){const a=document.createElement('a');a.href='#'+id;a.textContent=String(i+1);nav.append(a);}host.append(nav);for(const [i,id] of ids.entries()){const s=document.createElement('section');s.id=id;s.textContent=String(i+1);s.style.cssText='height:180px;';host.append(s);}document.body.append(host);try{const links=host.querySelectorAll('a');const second=document.getElementById(ids[1]);host.scrollTop=second.offsetTop;await new Promise(r=>requestAnimationFrame(()=>requestAnimationFrame(r)));return links[1].matches(':target-current')&&!links[0].matches(':target-current')&&!links[2].matches(':target-current');}finally{host.remove();}})()
